explanations.1: This line runs a shell command that checks if the PHP_VERSION matches the pattern for PHP 7 (like 7.0, 7.4, etc.), and stores either 'yes' or nothing in the variable IS_PHP_7; the $$ is how you write a single $ in a Makefile.
explanations.4: The ifdef keyword checks if IS_PHP_7 was defined (has a value), so it will be true whenever IS_PHP_7 contains 'yes'.
